chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 307 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «لاَ يُطَوِّلَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ شَارِبَهُ فَإِنَّ اَلشَّيْطَانَ يَتَّخِذُهُ مِجَنّاً يَسْتَتِرُ بِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.307 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"None of you should allow their moustache grow long, for Shaytan uses it as a shield to conceal himself”.
